notes: Definitions are encoded here from existing product and plan documents; this file does not record a benchmark run.
No G2 or G3 result file is valid unless it cites this definition file and the frozen Gate Zero manifest/competitor lock used for measurement.

decision_rule.all_pass: If G1, G2, and G3 all pass, parser-core expansion may continue to Milestone B.
decision_rule.g1_only_fail: If G1 fails while G2 and G3 pass, the named Gate Zero decider chooses either parser-core fallback or one bounded performance remediation retry; no speed claim is allowed until G1 passes.
decision_rule.g2_or_g3_fail: If G2 or G3 fails, parser-core expansion stops and Ethos continues as a parser-agnostic trust layer over foreign parser output.

excludes: network downloads during parse or verification
optional OCR or VLM assets outside the base parser surface
non-base parser adapters not required for the Ethos base distributable
includes: native dynamic libraries required by the base parser
PDFium sidecar or static payload required by the base parser
default schemas required by the base parser
all assets required to run the base parser without network access
measurement_scope.subject: Ethos base distributable installed footprint, measured as bytes on disk with no network dependency.

g2.name: Footprint
g2.platform_policy: Record G2 on each Gate Zero performance host where the installed artifact set can differ; do not average or substitute host measurements.
required_evidence: ethos_install_size_bytes measured from the exact base distributable artifact set
opendataloader_install_size_bytes measured in-harness from the pinned opendataloader-pdf artifact/install path
PDFium V8/XFA disabled evidence from the deterministic profile or linked profile attestation

source_refs.summary: G2 footprint: no more than 30 MB and no more than one tenth of measured OpenDataLoader installed footprint; includes CLI, native libs, PDFium payload, schemas, deterministic fonts, and no-network base parser assets.
G2 footprint: total installed footprint bytes on disk <= 30 MB and <= 1/10 measured ODL footprint; V8/XFA-enabled builds auto-fail.
opendataloader-pdf is the G1/G2 reference competitor.

thresholds.logic: PASS only when ethos_install_size_bytes <= 30000000 and ethos_install_size_bytes <= opendataloader_install_size_bytes * 0.1, with all auto-fail checks false.

g3.completion_policy: G3 cannot pass from a single platform result. It requires at least macOS arm64 and Linux x64 evidence for the full frozen manifest, then a cross-platform comparison showing zero canonical payload and fingerprint divergences.
g3.name: Determinism
required_evidence: schema-valid Ethos result evidence for every required determinism platform
matching corpus id, file path, corpus sha256, and actual sha256 for every compared corpus entry
equal canonical payload hash for every compared corpus entry across required platforms
equal document fingerprint for every compared corpus entry across required platforms
equal warning_ids for every compared corpus entry across required platforms
matching deterministic_profile_sha256 or an explicitly reviewed profile-difference blocker

source_refs.summary: G3 determinism: byte-identical canonical document payload across Gate Zero supported platforms, at minimum macOS arm64 and Linux x64, under the deterministic profile on the full frozen manifest.
G3 determinism: byte-identical canonical payload and equal fingerprints across supported platforms on the full frozen manifest; font mapper override and quantize-at-extraction must be implemented.
determinism_platforms declares macos-arm64 and linux-x64; G3 runs on the full frozen corpus.

g3.windows_x64_note: Windows x64 joins nightly determinism later and unresolved Windows divergence blocks or re-scopes Public Beta, but Windows is not part of the first local Gate Zero G3 pass/fail set.
